channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 5ca51376-e049-4302-abcc-64c588049c59
Display name: Azure Resilience Management Usage Contributor
Description: Contributor Role of Azure Resilience Management Usage
Link: https://management.azure.com/5ca51376-e049-4302-abcc-64c588049c59?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: b130f7de-5374-4e3d-ada8-bae6e49114b9
Display name: Azure Resilience Management Usage Reader
Description: Reader Role of Azure Resilience Management Usage
Link: https://management.azure.com/b130f7de-5374-4e3d-ada8-bae6e49114b9?api-version=2022-04-01

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: b66c1f7c-c685-40d6-b8b8-64b8230febf4
Display name: Azure Resilience Management Usage Administrator
Description: Administrator Role of Azure Resilience Management Usage
Link: https://management.azure.com/b66c1f7c-c685-40d6-b8b8-64b8230febf4?api-version=2022-04-01
